title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as robin and Usopp encounter the Tontatta people while Law’s meeting with Doflamingo and Fujitora becomes increasingly dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Just how many of these do you think there are?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There is a whole school out there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Let's just try and outrun them! We'll be here forever if we take them all on directly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's gonna have to fight too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But then he'll just fly off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Son of A-!! I'll make sure you die a slow painful death!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: to think a prodigous scientific mind reduced to grunt work...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Woah, he's strong! As expected of someone with a 300 million bounty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Mind explaining to me why you aren't fighting?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Using my powers deplates my stamina....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: My powers will be best served when we make our way back,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Conserving every little bit of my sta- Mina might be the difference between life and death!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Do not forget, we're dealing with Doflamingo here!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Is law ... seriously considering butting heads with Joker?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And thanks to this thick mist, I can't even see the other side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: At this rate what's remaining of the bridge won't hold!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Let's go regain our strength with some fighting fish stew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We need to cross over there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Quick, let's get out of here!!

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
